rune_affinities.note: Assign in whatever order the player desires

elemental_runes.name: Darkness
elemental_runes.symbol_note: Associated with trolls, darkness creatures, shadow

elemental_runes.name: Earth
elemental_runes.symbol_note: Associated with earth goddesses, fertility, stability

elemental_runes.name: Fire/Sky
elemental_runes.symbol_note: Associated with sun gods, light, purity

elemental_runes.name: Air
elemental_runes.symbol_note: Associated with Orlanth, storms, wind, violence

elemental_runes.name: Moon
elemental_runes.symbol_note: Associated with Lunar religion, cycles, illumination

rune_magic_note: Rune Affinities replace Exhort skill for casting Rune Spells. An initiate must roll against the Rune Affinity that controls the spell being cast. Devotion skill judges Intensity and Magnitude.

source_quotes.casting: the skill of Exhort is now replaced by whatever Rune Affinity controls the particular spell being cast
source_quotes.example: an initiate of Yelmalio who wished to cast a Sun Spear would need to roll against their Fire Rune affinity
source_quotes.limitations_p72: a character may directly use a Rune Affinity shared with his god to cast Rune Spells, relying upon the power of that god to create the magic

reconciliation_note: Verified against new AiG magic extraction (p.59-151). No contradictions found. This file (from p.24 chargen chapter) has the concrete formulas; the Rune Magic chapter (p.72) confirms the mechanic narratively.
